kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: The chromedriver version (145.0.7632.117) detected in PATH at /usr/bin/chromedriver might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (146.0.7680.71); currently, chromedriver 146.0.7680.72 is recommended for chrome 146.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Dado que o usuário esteja na tela de Login
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Enabled
kw.doc: Verifies that element identified by ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'css:p[class="error"]' should have contained text 'The username and password could not be verified.' but its text was 'An internal error has occurred and has been logged.'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.
kw.status: Element 'css:p[class="error"]' should have contained text 'The username and password could not be verified.' but its text was 'An internal error has occurred and has been logged.'.
Element 'css:p[class="error"]' should have contained text 'The username and password could not be verified.' but its text was 'An internal error has occurred and has been logged.'.

kw.name: Capturar Print Na Pasta Da Funcionalidade
Run Keyword If Test Failed
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.status: Element 'css:p[class="error"]' should have contained text 'The username and password could not be verified.' but its text was 'An internal error has occurred and has been logged.'.

errors.msg: The chromedriver version (145.0.7632.117) detected in PATH at /usr/bin/chromedriver might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (146.0.7680.71); currently, chromedriver 146.0.7680.72 is recommended for chrome 146.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry

The chromedriver version (145.0.7632.117) detected in PATH at /usr/bin/chromedriver might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (146.0.7680.71); currently, chromedriver 146.0.7680.72 is recommended for chrome 146.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry

The chromedriver version (145.0.7632.117) detected in PATH at /usr/bin/chromedriver might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (146.0.7680.71); currently, chromedriver 146.0.7680.72 is recommended for chrome 146.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
